Package com.airtribe.meditrack.entity

Class Appointment

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.entity.Appointment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Searchable, Serializable, Cloneable
public class Appointment extends Object implements Searchable, Serializable, Cloneable
Appointment entity with cloning support (deep copy). Demonstrates Cloneable interface with enum usage for status. Immutable LocalDateTime is safely shared in clones.
See Also:

    • clone

      public Appointment clone() throws CloneNotSupportedException
      Create a deep copy of appointment. LocalDateTime is immutable, so safe to share.
      Overrides:
      clone in class Object
      Returns:
      a deep copy of this appointment
      Throws:
      CloneNotSupportedException

    • deepCopy

      public static Appointment deepCopy(Appointment source)

      Parameters:
      source - the appointment to copy
      Returns:
      a new deep-copied appointment
